What we do

One workshop, every kind of sign.

Design, fabrication, print and installation under one roof — so your brand looks consistent on a building facade, a delivery van, and a trade-show wall.

01

Shopfront & 3D Signs

Illuminated channel letters, acrylic faces and brushed-metal lettering built to survive Gulf heat and look sharp under the sun.

02

Large-Format Printing

Banners, billboards, mesh and backlit film at full resolution — UV-stable inks that hold colour through the seasons.

03

Vehicle Wraps & Fleet

Full and partial wraps for cars, vans and fleets — precision-cut vinyl that turns every commute into a moving billboard.

04

Exhibition & Events

Booth builds, backdrops and pop-up branding for GITEX, Expo and every conference in between — designed, printed, installed.

05

Wayfinding & Interior

Directional, room and compliance signage for malls, offices, hospitals and hotels — clear systems people actually follow.

06

Brand & Graphic Design

Logos, identities and print-ready artwork — our in-house studio makes sure what we fabricate looks right from every angle.

مرحباﺗﺼﻤﻴﻢ
Bilingual by defaultArabic & English, set right
Built for the region

Signage that speaks the UAE’s two languages.

Every layout we produce is designed bilingually from the start — not Arabic bolted on afterward. We work with native Arabic typographers so kerning, calligraphic balance and right-to-left reading order are correct, not approximate.

  • Authentic Arabic typesetting reviewed by native designers
  • Compliant with Dubai Municipality & free-zone signage codes
  • Heat- and humidity-rated materials for Gulf conditions
Talk to our studio →
24/7on time
Design to installOne accountable team
How we’re different

Your whole project, handled by one partner.

Most signage jobs get split across a designer, a printer, a fabricator and an installer — and the brand suffers in the handoffs. We keep all four in-house, so the colour you approve is the colour that goes up on the wall.

  • In-house design, print, fabrication and licensed installation
  • Project manager assigned from quote to final sign-off
  • Express service when a launch date won’t move

The process

From idea to installed in four clear steps.

01

Consult & Survey

We visit your site, measure, photograph and learn your brand before a single line is drawn.

02

Design & Proof

Our studio returns bilingual mockups and material samples until you approve every detail.

03

Print & Fabricate

Production runs in our own workshop with daily QC — colour, finish and durability checked.

04

Install & Care

Licensed teams install safely, on schedule, with maintenance plans to keep signs pristine.

About Al Tareeq Advertising

Your signage and printing partner in Sharjah and across the UAE.

Al Tareeq Advertising L.L.C is a Sharjah-based signage company serving businesses throughout the United Arab Emirates, including Dubai, Ajman and Abu Dhabi. We design, print, fabricate and install a full range of signs and graphics in-house, so your brand looks consistent on a building facade, a delivery vehicle and a trade-show stand alike.

Our work covers illuminated shopfront signs and 3D acrylic and metal letters, large-format printing for banners and billboards, full and partial vehicle and fleet wraps, frosted glass branding and privacy film, wayfinding and interior signage for malls, offices, clinics and hotels, and complete exhibition and event branding. Every project is produced with UV-stable inks and heat-rated materials built to last in Gulf conditions.

Because the UAE market is bilingual, every layout we produce is designed in both Arabic and English from the start, with native Arabic typesetting and compliance with Dubai Municipality and free-zone signage requirements. From the first site survey to final installation, one project manager stays accountable — with express turnaround available when a launch date will not move.

FAQ

Common questions about our signage services.

What signage services do you offer in the UAE?
We provide shopfront and 3D letter signs, large-format printing, vehicle and fleet wraps, glass branding and frosted film, wayfinding and interior signage, and exhibition and event branding — all designed, printed, fabricated and installed in-house across Sharjah, Dubai and the wider UAE.
Do you make bilingual Arabic and English signs?
Yes. Every layout is designed bilingually from the start with native Arabic typesetting reviewed by Arabic designers, and we follow Dubai Municipality and free-zone signage codes.
How fast can you produce and install a sign?
Standard projects typically take about a week from artwork approval. When a launch date cannot move, we offer express turnaround as fast as 48 hours, with a project manager keeping everything on schedule.
Which areas of the UAE do you serve?
We are based in the Industrial Area, Sharjah and serve businesses across all seven Emirates, including Dubai, Ajman and Abu Dhabi. Site surveys and installation are handled by our own licensed teams.
Can you handle design, printing and installation together?
Yes — design, large-format printing, fabrication and installation are all done in-house. That means the colour you approve is the colour that goes up on the wall, with no quality lost in handoffs between separate vendors.

Got a wall, a window or a fleet that needs a sign?

Send us your idea — even a rough photo or sketch. We’ll come back with a concept, materials and a clear quote, usually within one business day.
